steps.title: Spot the opening parenthesis
steps.content: The phrase begins with an opening parenthesis before “as many”: (as many as 200,000, by some ______). This signals that a matching closing parenthesis is required.

steps.title: Apply the rule for matching parentheses
steps.content:
An opening parenthesis requires a matching closing parenthesis to properly enclose the parenthetical remark. The word estimates completes the phrase “by some estimates,” and must be followed by ) to close it. Choice A provides the required closing parenthesis; B adds an unnecessary comma after the paren, disrupting the flow to “in a complex...”; C replaces the closing paren with an em dash, leaving the opening unmatched; D fails to close the parenthetical altogether.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
